name: Coverage repair for senolytics ClinicalTrials.gov registry surveillance breadth follow-up 3
summary: Proposes a source-snapshot-backed registry surveillance repair for deferred fisetin frailty registries NCT03430037 and NCT03675724, plus durable search and screening records documenting broader ClinicalTrials.gov senolytics, D+Q, fisetin, and senescence-targeting term surveillance. The candidate keeps the active-trials registry gap open for additional deferred hits that still need their own source snapshots.

scope.question: coverage_repair: Run a source-snapshot-backed ClinicalTrials.gov surveillance pass for NCT03430037, NCT03675724, senolytics, D+Q, fisetin, and senescence-targeting terms; add no-results status records only when fetched registry snapshots support them.

proposed_records.rationale: Creates the submitted candidate-change ledger required for this coverage-repair proposal.

Updates the active-trials registry category to include source-snapshot-backed NCT03430037 and NCT03675724 no-posted-results records while preserving an open follow-up gap for additional deferred ClinicalTrials.gov hits.
Adds a source-snapshot-backed registry finding that NCT03675724 is enrolling by invitation with no posted results section.
Adds a source-snapshot-backed registry finding that NCT03430037 is enrolling by invitation with no posted results section.
Creates the registry-status outcome for the NCT03675724 ClinicalTrials.gov status/results-section check.
Creates the registry-status outcome for the NCT03430037 ClinicalTrials.gov status/results-section check.
Adds a no-posted-result registry result for NCT03675724 derived only from the retained ClinicalTrials.gov v2 snapshot.
Adds a no-posted-result registry result for NCT03430037 derived only from the retained ClinicalTrials.gov v2 snapshot.
Retains the ClinicalTrials.gov v2 API retrieval metadata, hash, and status/results summary supporting the NCT03430037 no-posted-results records.
Retains the ClinicalTrials.gov v2 API retrieval metadata, hash, and status/results summary supporting the NCT03675724 no-posted-results records.
Creates the canonical source record for the NCT03430037 ClinicalTrials.gov registry.
Creates the canonical source record for the NCT03675724 ClinicalTrials.gov registry.
Creates the registry-only study record for the NCT03675724 AFFIRM-LITE fisetin frailty trial.
Creates the registry-only study record for the NCT03430037 AFFIRM fisetin frailty trial.
Records the bounded coverage-repair session and its outcome.
Records exact ClinicalTrials.gov v2 queries, dates, result counts, retrieved counts, and selected hit decisions for the surveillance pass.
Records inclusion, duplicate, and deferred decisions for registry hits discovered during the bounded surveillance pass.
